note: This EPD uses 'Upstream/Core/Downstream' module naming rather than standard EN 15804 A1-A3. Per the data quality table, A1 (raw material supply) corresponds to Upstream, while A2 (transport) and A3 (manufacturing/electricity) correspond to Core; Downstream covers distribution/EOL. Values reported here are the sum of Upstream + Core columns to approximate A1-A3: GWP-fossil 1.41E-04+1.66E-04, GWP-biogenic -3.85E-05+2.81E-06, GWP-total 1.14E-04+1.69E-04, GWP-GHG 1.61E-04+1.67E-04. Declared unit is 1 gram of product.
